metadata.description: Fix all natbib citation commands in NHB2026 manuscript sections (introduction, methods, results, discussion). Replace \cite{} with appropriate \citet{}, \citep{}, or \citeauthor/\citeyearpar commands.

summary: Fixed all natbib citation commands in NHB2026 manuscript sections. Applied 4 rules across introduction.tex, methods.tex, results.tex (no changes needed), and discussion.tex. Total: ~55 replacements. All bare \cite{} commands replaced with \citet{}, \citep{}, or \citeauthor{}/\citeyearpar{} as appropriate. Zero bare \cite{} commands remain in any section file.

decision.description: Replace all \cite{} commands in NHB2026 manuscript sections with natbib-appropriate commands following four rules: (1) Manual author name + \cite{key} -> remove manual name, use \citet{key}; (2) Parenthetical \cite{key} at end of clause -> \citep{key}; (3) Possessives like "Entman's~\cite{key}" -> \citeauthor{key}'s~\citeyearpar{key}; (4) Product names before \cite{key} (DeepDream, DALL-E) are NOT doubled names, keep product name and use \citep{key}.
decision.rationale: With natbib + plainnat, \cite{key} produces "Author (Year)" with no outer parentheses. When an author name is manually typed before \cite{key}, this causes doubling (e.g., "Lovato et al. Lovato et al. (2024)"). Using \citet{} produces "Author (Year)" and \citep{} produces "(Author, Year)", which are the standard natbib inline and parenthetical forms respectively.
decision.revision_note: All four rules applied successfully across 4 files with 55 total citation replacements. Zero bare \cite{} commands remain.

annotation.content:
Completed natbib citation fix across 4 NHB2026 manuscript sections. Summary of changes:

INTRODUCTION.TEX (27 replacements):
- 16 manual-author-name + \cite -> \citet (Lovato et al., Kawakami & Venkatagiri, Varvasovszky and Brugha, Jiang et al., Zai et al., Bogh, Banks and Li, Sichach, Pane, Huang and Gadavanij, Baeyaert, Mazzone and Elgammal, Browne, Cheung, Saeedi and Taleghani, DiMaggio/Nag/Blei)
- 1 possessive (Entman's~\cite) -> \citeauthor{}'s~\citeyearpar{}
- 2 product/concept names (DeepDream, DALL-E) -> kept name + \citep
- 8 parenthetical end-of-clause -> \citep

METHODS.TEX (4 replacements):
- 2 manual-author-name + \cite -> \citet (Lovato et al. x2)
- 2 parenthetical end-of-clause -> \citep

RESULTS.TEX: No citations found, no changes needed.

DISCUSSION.TEX (24 replacements):
- 8 manual-author-name + \cite -> \citet (Huang and Gadavanij, Baeyaert, Bogh, Lovato et al., Kawakami and Venkatagiri, Jiang et al., Sichach, Pane)
- 2 product/concept names (DeepDream, GANs) -> kept name + \citep
- 14 parenthetical end-of-clause -> \citep

contribution.description: Fixed 55 natbib citation commands across 4 NHB2026 manuscript sections
